NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT HELD ON NOV-4-2025 AT 10:00AM IN DEPT 304. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER. A TENTATIVE RULING WAS CIRCULATED PRIOR TO THE HEARING. DURING THE HEARING, THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO THE TENTATIVE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENATIVE AND WILL ISSUE ORDER AND FINAL JUDGMENT PENDING PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S SUBMISSION OF PROPOSED ORDER AND SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. A FINAL COMPLIANCE HEARING WILL BE SET IN MID-SEPTEMBER 2026 AND WILL BE STATED IN THE ORDER. JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK EDWARD SANTOS; DEPT 304.
